problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Sleep-dependent. Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
